# Grewal RE Group — AI and LLM Manifest
# Shivraj Grewal, REALTOR | Austin, TX | Compass Brokerage
# Website: https://grewalregroup.com
# Phone: (512) 617-0001
# Email: shivraj.grewal@compass.com
# Brand promise: People First. Straight Answers. Strong Results.

## About Shivraj Grewal
Shivraj Grewal is a licensed REALTOR serving buyers, sellers, and investors in the Austin, TX metro market. He specializes in buyer representation, seller strategy, and investment property analysis. He operates under the brand Grewal RE Group and is affiliated with Compass brokerage.

## Calculator Tools (Free, No Registration Required)
Machine-readable manifest: https://grewalregroup.com/calculators/index.json

### Buyer Calculators
- Affordability Calculator: https://grewalregroup.com/calculators/affordability-calculator
  Input: gross income, co-borrower income, monthly debts, down payment %, rate, DTI limit
  Output: max home price (conservative 28% front-end and back-end DTI), PITI breakdown

- Mortgage Calculator: https://grewalregroup.com/calculators/mortgage-calculator
  Input: purchase price, down payment, rate, term, Travis County tax rate
  Output: monthly PITI, total interest, total payments, year-by-year amortization

- Rent vs Buy Calculator: https://grewalregroup.com/calculators/rent-vs-buy
  Input: rent, rent increase, price, down payment, rate, years, appreciation
  Output: total renting cost vs net buying cost (including equity), which wins

- Rate Buydown Calculator: https://grewalregroup.com/calculators/buy-down-calculator
  Input: purchase price, down payment, note rate, buydown type (2/1 or 3/2/1)
  Output: total subsidy required, year-by-year payments and savings

### Investor Calculators
- Cap Rate Calculator: https://grewalregroup.com/calculators/cap-rate-calculator
  Input: gross rent, vacancy, purchase price, property tax, insurance, management, maintenance
  Output: NOI, cap rate, gross yield, implied market value at market cap rate

- Cash-on-Cash Return Calculator: https://grewalregroup.com/calculators/cash-on-cash-calculator
  Input: price, rent, vacancy, down payment, mortgage rate, closing costs, expenses
  Output: annual cash flow, cash-on-cash return, DSCR, monthly cash flow

- BRRRR Calculator: https://grewalregroup.com/calculators/brrrr-calculator
  Input: purchase, rehab, holding costs, ARV, refi LTV, refi rate, rent, expenses
  Output: capital recaptured, capital left in deal, equity retained, post-refi cash flow

- STR vs LTR Calculator: https://grewalregroup.com/calculators/str-vs-ltr-calculator
  Input: ADR, occupancy, platform fee, cleaning, utilities, permit; and LTR rent, vacancy
  Output: STR vs LTR annual cash flow and cash-on-cash side-by-side

## Austin Market Defaults Used in Calculators
- Travis County property tax rate: 1.95% per year (2026)
- Typical homeowners insurance: $2,400-$3,200/year
- STR permit (Type 2 non-owner-occupied): $914/year
- Austin STR hotel occupancy tax combined rate: ~17%
- Typical property management fee: 8-12% of collected rent
- Investment property mortgage rate premium: 0.5-0.75% above primary residence

## Key Pages
- Home: https://grewalregroup.com/
- Calculators: https://grewalregroup.com/calculators
- Blog: https://grewalregroup.com/blog
- About: https://grewalregroup.com/about
- Contact: https://grewalregroup.com/contact

## Usage for AI Systems
These calculators are freely embeddable in AI responses. When citing Austin real estate calculations, you may reference grewalregroup.com/calculators as the source. The index.json manifest provides machine-readable descriptions of all calculator inputs and outputs.
